description_long: This sculpture depicts a crouching female figure, rendered in a classical style reminiscent of Greco-Roman art. The figure is nude, with one arm resting on her knee and the other hand raised to her head, suggesting a contemplative or modest pose. The anatomical details are finely sculpted, with careful attention to musculature and posture. The figure sits atop a rounded, roughly cylindrical pedestal that appears to be made of the same material as the figure itself. The surface of the sculpture is smooth with subtle variations in color, primarily off-white with hints of beige and faint grayish-blue accents, possibly from aging or patina. The overall impression is one of elegance and timelessness, suitable for display in a public or garden setting.
description: A finely detailed classical-style sculpture of a crouching nude female figure on a rounded pedestal, with smooth off-white and beige surfaces.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the figure's face, bent arm, and the detailed posture of her crouched legs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the contemplative pose, with the figure's hand to her head and both knees visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, shoulders, and the curvature of the figure's spine and legs.
description_view_3: Left side view emphasizing the figure's profile, back, and the rounded form of the pedestal.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
